response.justification: Maria has extensive experience as a full-stack engineer with 10+ years in the industry, exceeding the 6+ years required. Her deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB aligns well with the primary stack, and her work with AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq demonstrates familiarity with emerging technologies. While her primary languages (TypeScript, DLang) don't perfectly match the required Kotlin/Java, her broad polyglot experience and architectural skills compensate. Her open-source contributions and mentorship roles indicate strong collaboration and leadership potential.
strengths: 10+ years of full-stack engineering experience with a polyglot approach (TypeScript, DLang, Java, C++)
Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, Kubernetes)
Strong open-source contributions and mentorship in testing/TDD practices
concerns: Lack of clear recent experience with Kotlin/Java (required secondary stack), though prior Java experience exists
Primary frontend experience with Ember.js rather than React (though React is listed in skills)
Gaps in cloud platform experience (AWS/GCP/Azure) are not explicitly detailed in resume

key_factors.factor: AI-agent infrastructure and emerging tech exposure
Lack of Kotlin/Java experience in recent roles
